title: Initial position: pawn and knight moves
description: Starting position with two dice rolled: Pawn (1) and Knight (2). Since no micro-move can block another in the initial turn, the legal moves are the sum of all individual legal pawn moves and all individual legal knight moves.

title: Short castling
description: Short castling is possible in this position

title: Long castling
description: Long castling is possible in this position

title: Force promotion to knight
description: Forcing a pawn to promote to a knight in this position

title: Force promotion to bishop
description: Forcing a pawn to promote to a bishop in this position

title: Force promotion to rook
description: Forcing a pawn to promote to a rook in this position

title: Force promotion to queen
description: Forcing a pawn to promote to a queen in this position

title: Beat the King or force promotion to knight
description: Beat the King (1 micro move) or forcing a pawn to promote to a knight in this position (2 micro moves). Both options are legal and the player can choose which one to execute.

title: Beat the King or force promotion to bishop
description: Beat the King (1 micro move) or forcing a pawn to promote to a bishop in this position (2 micro moves). Both options are legal and the player can choose which one to execute.

title: Beat the King or force promotion to rook
description: Beat the King (1 micro move) or forcing a pawn to promote to a rook in this position (2 micro moves). Both options are legal and the player can choose which one to execute.

title: Beat the King or force promotion to queen
description: Beat the King (1 micro move) or forcing a pawn to promote to a queen in this position (2 micro moves). Both options are legal and the player can choose which one to execute.
